report_types.name: KPI Report
report_types.description: Comprehensive KPI report from Notion KPI Tracking DB — productivity, quality, attendance and performance metrics across all staff and projects for a selected date range

report_types.name: Daily Attendance Summary Report
report_types.description: Daily attendance records, leave summary, and presence tracking for all team members across all projects

report_types.name: Bench Resource Report
report_types.description: Lists all bench resources currently unallocated or partially allocated, with skills and availability

report_types.name: Lump Sum Monthly Invoice (PA)
report_types.description: Generates monthly Payment Application with invoice summary and payment certificate

report_types.name: Lump Sum Monthly Progress Report
report_types.description: Monthly project progress report with milestone status and deliverables update

report_types.name: Manmonth Efficiency Report
report_types.description: Manmonth burn rate, efficiency index, and budget health analysis

report_types.name: Employee KPI Report
report_types.description: Employee KPI scores, performance ratings, and productivity summary

report_types.name: Variation Claim Compiler
report_types.description: Compiles and formats all pending variation claims for the project

report_types.name: Kickoff Document Generator
report_types.description: Generates full project kickoff documentation package including BEP and team allocation

report_types.name: Resourcing Monthly Invoice (PA)
report_types.description: Monthly Payment Application for resourcing/deputation projects based on timesheets

report_types.name: Resourcing Monthly Report
report_types.description: Monthly status report for resourcing projects including attendance and deployment summary

report_types.name: Resource Utilization Report
report_types.description: Resource utilization rate, man-month consumption, and deployment analysis

report_types.name: Resourcing KPI Report
report_types.description: KPI performance report for deployed resources including utilization and timesheet compliance

report_types.name: Resource Variation Report
report_types.description: Resource rate revision and variation claim document for resourcing projects

report_types.name: Portfolio PA Summary
report_types.description: Portfolio-level Payment Application summary across all active projects for the month
